subject: Fix delta: execution-gate/resolver P0s resolved in retest
body:
Progress delta from Kernel:

Work executed:
- Patched lane-worker fail-closed routing for completion-proof messages with unverified artifacts.
- Propagated patched scripts/lane-worker.js to Archivist, Kernel, Library, SwarmMind.
- Distributed scripts/cross-lane-consistency-check.js to Kernel, Library, SwarmMind for parity.

Independent re-test results (all 4 lanes):
- test-execution-gate.js => PASS 10 / FAIL 0
- test-artifact-resolver.js => PASS 8 / FAIL 0
- cross-lane-consistency-check.js => runs in all 4 lanes now

Consistency highlights:
- Trust store hash and key IDs: consistent across all lanes
- Schema validator enums: synced across all lanes
- Shared scripts: lane-worker/artifact-resolver/etc synced
- Remaining divergence noted: heartbeat.js differs by lane size (expected lane-specific behavior possible)

Conclusion:
- Previously reproduced P0s for execution-gate/artifact-resolver are now resolved in test battery.
- Cross-lane consistency checker parity gap is closed (script now present in all lanes).
